prompts.promptPos:
A streetwear poster illustration using the attached objects, rendered 100% identical, ultra-detailed with a bold editorial manga layout, combining the aesthetics of modern Japanese fashion branding with high-energy shonen anime visuals. The white background is dominated by a paper texture, with intense saturated orange, deep black, and subtle gray accents as the primary color palette. A dynamic, asymmetrical composition filled with large-scale typography, layered Japanese kanji (words adapted to the object's theme), branding patches, barcode graphics, tactical labels, and magazine-inspired layout elements distributed around the characters.
A strong urban-techwear visual identity is achieved with a glossy nylon fabric rendering, reflective highlights, detailed stitching, zipper textures, utility straps, embroidered patches, and layered accessories. Very subtle cel-shading is mixed with semi-realistic rendering, featuring sharp lines, dramatic contrast, sharp edge lighting, and painting-like shadow gradients. The folds of the garments are rendered with aggressive angular shapes and glossy reflections.
The background design uses expressive paint strokes, ink splatters, halftone textures, rough brushstrokes, worn print grain, smooth paper textures, and  The aesthetics of a manga poster. Typography is integrated into the composition using a large, dense, bold font, vertical Japanese text columns, emblem symbols, a power stats panel, logos, icons, and scattered micrographic details.
The poster layout feels premium, energetic, and collectible—a strong balance between negative space and dense graphic clusters. The clean white negative space contrasts with explosive orange paint strokes and black graphic accents. Highly detailed, cinematic anime illustrations with ultra-sharp rendering, dynamic pose framing, layered depth, and a stylish commercial poster finish

Create a highly detailed portrait poster in the iconic GTA San Andreas-inspired art style, featuring the subject as the main focal point with a modern cinematic composition. Incorporate five recognizable landmarks from major cities in Indonesia as part of the background environment, blended naturally into the poster design with a dynamic urban atmosphere. Add decorative ornaments, graphic elements, textures, shapes, graffiti accents, street-style details, and layered visual decorations that strongly reflect the bold and stylish aesthetic of classic GTA San Andreas promotional artwork, while still feeling modern and trendy.

The subject’s pose must be completely different from the reference photo, with a more natural, expressive, and lively body language. Avoid stiff, flat, or awkward posing. The expression should feel charismatic, confident, and full of personality, with the elegance and attitude of an international fashion model. The pose should look dynamic yet classy, creating a strong visual presence inside the composition.

The outfit should feature modern casual fashion with stylish contemporary streetwear aesthetics. Use varied clothing colors, patterns, materials, and layering combinations that feel fashionable and visually rich, avoiding anything plain, repetitive, or monotonous. The styling should look trendy, premium, youthful, and suitable for a modern urban lifestyle campaign.

Design the poster with a highly engaging and non-generic layout. Every typography element inside the poster must use bold, eye-catching, stylish fonts with strong visual hierarchy, inspired by premium urban graphic design aesthetics. Avoid standard or overly simple typography styles. Add creative placement of text, layered title compositions, subtle distortions, sticker-like graphics, urban poster textures, and modern editorial design touches to make the poster feel visually alive and contemporary.

The overall visual must feel vibrant, cinematic, stylish, and high-end, not mediocre, flat, or overly simplistic. Use dramatic lighting, rich contrast, detailed shadows, vivid color grading, and immersive composition to create a premium modern GTA-inspired poster atmosphere. Ensure the final artwork looks ultra-detailed, polished, visually dense, and rendered in stunning 8K resolution. Humanity really looked at a 2004 game loading screen and decided, “this is eternal visual culture.” Strangely, they were correct.

Bold neo-expressionist urban illustration style with cinematic graphic-novel aesthetics, rough ink sketch linework, imperfect hand-drawn contours, layered painterly shading, and semi-flat cel shading. Dominant muted steel-blue background contrasted with intense glowing crimson-red typography blocks and signage. Deep navy and indigo tones on clothing and shadows, with warm orange-red highlights subtly reflecting onto the subject. High contrast lighting with dramatic dark shadows and soft atmospheric haze. Dynamic textured brush strokes mixed with vector-like clean shapes. Slightly gritty poster-art finish, distressed urban textures, abstract typographic composition filling the background, and minimal environmental detail. Flying birds scattered across the sky to create motion and scale. Composition feels cinematic, rebellious, poetic, and modern. Fine black sketch scratches and unfinished scribble details remain visible around buildings and edges. Matte color grading with subtle grain, graphic silhouette emphasis, and layered depth using soft foggy blue ambience.

High-contrast monochrome vector illustration style with bold graphic shading and sharp angular forms. Clean digital line art combined with layered flat tones and hard shadows, creating a dramatic, intense visual impact. Limited grayscale palette accented by subtle neon cyan highlights for a modern edgy feel. Strong comic-book and street art influence, poster-style composition, crisp contours, exaggerated expressions, minimalist background, ultra-clean finish, graphic novel aesthetic, high clarity, modern digital illustration

Create a modern football event poster featuring based on my attached image of Manchester United FC using the reference image, designed in a hyper-realistic multi-layer collage composition with five different football poses representing various player movements and positions: one large back-facing portrait placed in the center background, two medium side-profile poses looking left and right, one dynamic foreground pose dribbling the football, and one powerful foreground pose shooting the ball, all arranged in a clean and balanced vertical layout.Use a modern football academy campaign aesthetic with strong yellow and black color grading combined with Manchester United red tones, enhanced by glowing yellow light effects behind the subjects, geometric yellow and black rectangle blocks layered throughout the composition, soft white glow outlines around each cutout, subtle smoke and fog atmosphere, and a white football pitch-inspired background with soft vignette and realistic floor shadows beneath the players for added depth. Add bold giant headline typography reading “PromptersMX ” using condensed bold sans-serif fonts with an energetic professional sports branding style, include the Manchester United club crest on the left side, and apply dramatic sports studio lighting with high contrast, cinematic glow highlights, clean professional finishing, and a portrait 4:5 aspect ratio.

It has clean line work and a pleasant, appealing drawn aesthetic style. Overall, it's a world-class illustration with flawless line work, perfect composition, and impeccable attention to detail.

The images is rendered as a modern japanese animated movie, with clean and precise linework, and a bright, polished look. The composition feels dynamic yet harmonious, with careful attention to lighting, contratst, and atmosphere. The render evokes the clarity and visual depth of contempory high-quality anime films and series, combining expressivity and rich detailed visuals. It has sharp outlines and flat textures and captures the refined visual storytelling of modern anime. It brings the scene to life thanks to soft shading and a balanced use of light and color while contrasts bring more depth. It looks crisp, and visually engaging.The resolution is as high as possible so the picture remains clear even when zooming in. The composition is dynamic, varied, and asymmetrical. It avoids boredom, repetition and overly predictable patterns. It has the best output quality.
